assertions.title: Single-video intake classifies the link and routes directly to preparation

steps.action: Open the intake page and submit a supported Douyin single-video URL
steps.expected: The link is accepted and classified as a single video
steps.observed: Submitted https://www.douyin.com/video/7518353061515447591 and the app accepted it, created session session_504c2ecac6dd37446c50824e, and treated the flow as a single-video intake.

steps.expected: The app routes directly to preparation without rendering candidate review first
steps.observed: After processing, the browser landed on /sessions/session_504c2ecac6dd37446c50824e/preparation and no candidate-review surface appeared.

steps.expected: Preparation page reflects the single-video session state
steps.observed: The page rendered the Preparation Status screen with a single pending item titled 'Single Video Content - 75183530'.

assertions.title: Single-video preparation starts with exactly one item

steps.action: Review the first preparation page shown after single-video intake
steps.expected: Preparation starts immediately with one item and no candidate-review detour
steps.observed: The first destination was the preparation page, which showed 'Preparing 1 item' and never displayed candidate-review UI.

steps.expected: Exactly one preparation item is rendered for the submitted video
steps.observed: The preparation page displayed one row for 'Single Video Content - 75183530' with pending status.

steps.expected: The session payload contains exactly one preparation item
steps.observed: GET /api/sessions/session_504c2ecac6dd37446c50824e returned a single item (item_e62c4c732e44631c25482339) with prepStatus 'pending'.

evidence.network: POST /api/intake -> 200; GET /api/sessions/session_504c2ecac6dd37446c50824e -> 200 with one item; repeated polling GET /api/sessions/session_504c2ecac6dd37446c50824e -> 200

frictions.description: The shared user-testing guidance file /Users/wendy/.factory/library/user-testing.md was missing.
frictions.resolution: Used mission-local AGENTS.md guidance, the validation contract, and established flow-report examples in the repo.

frictions.description: The initial screenshot captured while the button still showed 'Processing...', before navigation settled.
frictions.resolution: Waited for the route change to finish and captured the settled preparation-page screenshots plus session/network evidence.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. The repaired single-video flow routed directly from intake to preparation and rendered exactly one preparation item for the submitted Douyin video.
